code

Changelog

Every release, every change. Updated with each version of Mekong CLI.

v5.0.0

Current

March 21, 2026

  • New OpenClaw Engine — full PEV (Plan-Execute-Verify) loop with autonomous rollback on failed verification gates
  • New 319 commands across 5 layers: Founder, Business, Product, Engineering, Ops — up from 230 in v4.5
  • New MCU billing system — credit-based pricing deducted only on successful delivery; HTTP 402 on zero balance
  • New Universal LLM routing — 3-variable config supports any provider: OpenRouter, Anthropic, Qwen, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama
  • New RaaS API v2 — REST endpoint for all 319 commands; async mission dispatch with webhook delivery
  • New Tôm Hùm daemon — autonomous CTO mode running continuous Plan→Deploy→Verify→Status loop
  • New 542 skill definitions in .claude/skills/ — auto-loaded on session start
  • Improved mekong cook — now generates tests by default, verifies build before reporting success
  • Improved Provider fallback chain — automatic failover across 7 providers when primary is unavailable
  • Fixed Session context loss on long-running missions exceeding 32k tokens
  • Fixed Pre-commit hook false positives on files containing the word "apps" in comments

v4.5.0

January 15, 2026

  • New Founder layer commands — 46 commands: annual, okr, fundraise, swot, pitch, vc/cap-table, ipo/*
  • New 230 commands total — major expansion of sales, marketing, and finance command sets
  • New Cloudflare-only deploy infrastructure — 3-layer scaffold: Pages + Workers + D1/KV/R2
  • New 410 machine contracts in factory/contracts/ — JSON-defined agent workflows
  • Improved mekong sales/prospect — now enriches with LinkedIn data and ICP scoring in single pass
  • Improved mekong review — security scan now covers OWASP Top 10, not just TypeScript errors
  • Improved Shell init script — source shell-init.sh now sets up all provider aliases in under 1 second
  • Fixed mekong-qwen alias failing when DASHSCOPE_API_KEY not set in environment
  • Fixed Race condition in parallel agent execution when writing to shared .mekong/tasks/ directory

v4.0.0

October 3, 2025

  • New Multi-provider architecture — single mekong binary routes to Claude, Gemini, Qwen, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint
  • New Agent layer — GitAgent, FileAgent, ShellAgent, LeadHunter, ContentWriter as composable primitives
  • New mekong-docs package — Astro-based documentation site with guides, API reference, and blog
  • New PEV Engine — planner.py, executor.py, verifier.py, orchestrator.py replacing monolithic task runner
  • Improved LLM client — unified llm_client.py with automatic retry and provider health checks
  • Improved mekong deploy — now validates Cloudflare Workers syntax before pushing; rolls back on health check failure
  • Fixed mekong test hanging indefinitely when pytest subprocess produced no output for 60+ seconds
  • Fixed Incorrect MCU deduction when mission was partially executed before provider timeout
  • Fixed mekong status showing stale task state when .mekong/tasks/ was modified externally

v3.0.0

June 12, 2025

  • New Initial public release — Mekong CLI open-sourced under MIT license
  • New 135 commands across Engineering and Ops layers
  • New CC CLI integration — mekong wrapper delegates to Claude Code CLI with full command discovery
  • New Skill system — 200+ skill definitions in .claude/skills/ covering code, research, and business operations
  • New mekong cook — natural language to production code with plan, execute, verify loop
  • New mekong fix — AI-powered bug resolution with full codebase context
  • Improved Command discovery — commands in .claude/commands/ auto-loaded without symlinks or manual registration
  • Fixed Shell init script failing on zsh when ~/.zshrc used non-standard PATH ordering

Stay Up to Date

Follow the repo on GitHub for release notifications. New versions ship monthly.
